description:
The ballistics path mesh is a component that generates a stripe or tube mesh that traces the future path of a virtual thrown object.

Tube mode currently does not work due to a small oversight. See issue 2901

fields.InitialPosition: The initial position of the ballistics path.
fields.InitialVelocity: The initial velocity of the ballistics path.
fields.Gravity: The gravity affecting the ballistics path (m/s^2)
fields.Drag: the resistance through the air of the generated ballistics path
fields.StepSize: How many units maximum every bend/segment is in length (the last segment may be shorter).
fields.TotalUnits: How many segments the path mesh will have give or take 1 or 2.
fields.Shape: What shape the arc should be rendered as.
fields.Size: How big to scale this ballisitics path
fields.Points: how many sides the tube mesh uses. Only accepts values greater than or equal to 3.
fields.DualSided: whether the generated mesh should be dual sided.
fields.Up: The up direction against gravity for the generated mesh (local space)
fields.DistanceSizeGrowth: How much to make the width/radius of the path mesh grow as it progresses along the arc.
fields.MinGrownSize: How skinny at minimum the Ballistic Path Mesh will get from applying ``DistanceSizeGrowth``.
fields.MaxGrownSize: How wide at maximum the Ballistic Path Mesh will get from applying ``DistanceSizeGrowth``.
fields.UseLastSegment: Whether to add one final segment that goes to LastSegmentPosition
fields.LastSegmentPosition: The local position to place the end of the last segment at if ``UseLastSegment`` is enabled.
